name: Steal Brainrots From Bosses
description: How many Brainrots can you STEAL? Remember… don’t anger the Brainrot guarding the base! Grab a Brainrot from another player’s base Run from the Brainrot chasing you Bring it to your base to earn in-game currency!
instructions: Ready to risk it all for Brainrots Sneak into other players rsquo bases grab valuable trophies and stay alert mdash an enraged Brainrot may chase you down Escape in time and deliver your loot to your base to boost your progress
